title: Connection equipment
abstract: This invention is related to a connection equipment that allows to connect router or carrier devices like a tripod and a camera to each other. With this invention, it is aimed to establish or take down camera-tripod like connections in an easier and more convenient way. The developed connection equipment has a screw socket that provide a connection to the carrier or router equipments and a connection screw that provide a connection to the camera. Additionally it has counter screws (4) that is located on the walls of screw socket and a movable body (6) that enables the user persons to rotate the counter screws (4).
claims: Claims The connection equipment (1) provide the connection between a camera with a camera screw socket and a carrier or router with an equipment screw and contain; A fixed body A screw socket (2) on the fixed body which acounts for the connection of the equipment screw and A connection screw (3) on the fixed body which accounts for the connection of the camera screw socket. And this connection equipment (1) is characterized by; At least one counter screw (4) that is located on the walls of the screw socket (2) without touching each other, lies parallel to the screw socket (2) and can turn around itself. And A moveable body (6) that can be rotated around the screw socket (2) by the user person and have a transfer surface (5) that encircle the counter screws (4) by partly touching to the outer surface of counter screws (4) relative to the screw socket (2). It is a connection equipment (1) that is stated in claim 1, and characterized by; A moveable body (6) that include fixed body, screw socket (2) of the fixed body and the connection screw (3) of the fixed body that touches party to the carrier or router equipment, and encircle without a part that touch the camera. A connection screw (3) that has a protrusion (10) that stays on the related surface of the fixed body and pushes the fixed body toward the camera, when it is inserted in screw socket and tightened, so prevents the motion of the fixed body relative to the camera. 3. It is a connection equipment (1) that is stated in claim 1, and characterized by; The transfer surface (5) which has a shape like a protrusion (10) that reach out from inner wall of the moveable body (6) to inside the volume that is encircled by the moveable body (6) and stay inside a groove that lie along the wall of the fixed body and faces the moveable body (6). 4. It is a connection equipment (1) that is stated in claim 1 and characterized by; a fixed body that is located in the perimeter of the screw socket (2) and has beds (9) in which counter screws (4) can rotate. 5. It is a connection equipment (1) that is stated in claim 1 and characterized by; three counter screws (4). 6. It is a connection equipment (1) that is stated in claim 1 and characterized by; a moveable body (6) that possess an extension. 7. It is a connection equipment (1) that is stated in claim 1 and characterized by; at least one pillow (8) that is located on the surface of fixed body which touches the camera. 8. It is a connection equipment (1) that is stated in claim 1 and characterized by; A fixed body that possesses a lower body (11) that has screw socket (2) and beds (9) and connects to the carrier or router equipment, a upper body (12) that has connection screw (3) and pillow (8) and connects to the camera. 9. It is a connection equipment (1) that is stated in claim 8 and characterized by; a body screw (14) that attach upper (12) and lower (11) bodies and passes through the holes in both upper (12) and lower (11) bodies. 10. It is a connection equipment (1) that is stated in claim 8 and characterized by; A transfer surface (5) that extends from the inner wall of the moveable body (6) to the volume enclosed by the moveable body (6) and shaped like an extension between upper (12) and lower (11) bodies.
